Uh What we're gonna do is we are a tool that scrapes the internet to pull all publicly available data on a landlord's website.
We pull that data into a concise market survey that you'll all be able to interact with and engage with here.

What that means is that every day at about a midnight or so, we go ahead and scrape all your comp set properties, scrape their website so that the following morning, you can come in and see the most up to date information as you need it.
So if there was a change uh in the rent at your local comp at 4 p.m. in the afternoon, tomorrow morning, you'll be able to know all about it and be able to track that.
